currentLinkedIn.headline: Full-Stack Developer at Sprig | TypeScript · Next.js · Postgres | Amsterdam
currentLinkedIn.about: Two years into my career building full-stack features at a Series A startup. I care about shipping quality code, learning fast, and being someone my team can rely on.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
